name: American Beef Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly and stuff into hog casings.
2. Place in boiling water, ensuring the mixture is completely covered with water, and boil for about 1/2 hour.
3. Take from pot and allow to cool.
4. Refrigerate.
5. To serve, cut meat into thin slices and broil slowly until brown on all sides.
